review_text:
Past professional service,
we’ll see the results in a few weeks.
My removal is going great very pleased and my tech is very knowledgeable. Let’s me know everything that is going on and my treatment plan.she’s the best

I appreciate you guys so much.  You take your time and are gentle.  You give me all the time I need to cry-baby my way through the treatment.  You’re actually becoming friends that are helping me through this bad decision and I ❤️ you for it.  See you next month

Great staff! Always look forward to seeing them
Plus, my tattoo is nearly gone. Very effective treatment!
Always very nice and professional!!’
Had a really good experience with the staff they made me feel really comfortable
Sarah, Melaina and Zac at downtown Removery are always great!

They have been working on my face , they were able to help me with a payment plan and I make a payment before each trip, love all the staff there and they always makes sure it’s VERY quick and as painless as possible

Couldn’t be happier. Zac walked me through every step and made me feel at ease. The service itself was complete within minutes and I’m already feeling better about my tattoo removal. Happy to have found Removery!
Great experience here! Everyone is super nice!
10/10 do recommend!!   they were very professional and polite, and it exceeded my expectations i am very happy with my results !
The employees are so nice and professional.

10 out of 10!
Front desk service and the technicians

🤍

Had a great first session removing the tattoo off my back that I’ve had for over 20+ years. Zac did a great job of explaining the process. Sara did a great job of helping me through the first session- going slow, explaining the process, and making me as comfortable as possible during the laser. I can already see the scar slightly faded after the first round. Had some discomfort after the first treatment, but the next day could hardly feel anything. Will update this review once I’m finished removing the tattoo

I truly had the best experience here - Tattoo removal can be spicy, and they made me feel SO comfortable and confident here. I feel like I can actually handle my tattoo removal journey now - not to be dramatic! It was clean and thoughtfully curated, everyone I interacted with was so friendly and genuinely interested in my experience and making sure I felt comfortable at my appointment. I can’t say enough good things and again, I’m so much more confident in getting my tattoos removed after coming here.
such great service, they really know what they’re doing!
It was such a pleasure to meet Zach! He thoroughly explained the process and walked me through the pricing. I am so excited to get started with them.
I’ve been going to Removery for a little over a year now and the team is absolutely marvelous. Always so warm and welcoming when I come in. Wish I had more tattoos I needed to remove 😅
Everyone was so professional and Sarah made it quick as possible. Much recommended for tattoo removal
Well done!

So very helpful and informative. Had a consultation and was thoroughly informed on the process and what my journey is going to look like and felt comfortable throughout. So relieving that Removery exists. Looking forward to my first scheduled treatment! :)

A client of mine referred me to The Removery and I couldn’t be happier! I was thrilled that they offer payment plans and total removal packages. The staff (South Congress location) was very friendly and made the process easy and seamless. They’ve been great with explaining the process and walking me through the steps, which put me much more at ease. I just did my third session and I’m very happy to see my tattoo fading after each visit.  I am trusting the process even though it’s a lengthy one, I know I’m in good hands!
Sarah is quick and attentive. Super grateful because the removal can be painful but her patience helps make it less painful.
Slowly working.  Takes 10+ treatments

Zac, Melaina, and Sarah have taken such great care of me every step of my tattoo removal journey. People ask me all the time if the laser hurts - honestly - not really, and it’s over in a literal flash for my smallish tattoos. If you could handle the feeling of getting the tattoo, you can handle this. Lovely people, great service!

The South Congress team is always so kind and attentive. They work hard to accommodate their clients and I feel so comfortable at my appointments. I know I’m in great hands and truly admire their tenacity being a small team! Big thank you to y’all!
Super quick and friendly environment!
Nicest people in the world and really great work :)
I love the team at removery. Always great conversations and they make you as comfortable as possible for your procedure.

Went to south congress location. Very friendly and knowledgeable staff. Consultation went great, Zac did very well in explaining the process. I will  be sending many people over for removals so they can share the same great experience.
I am impressed with the office staff. They were very friendly. So glad I found them!

New Review: I’ve been working with Zac and Sarah for 2 years now for complete removal! They are literally the best to work with. They not only love what they do but they love helping people feel more confident and beautiful no matter if you have a good or a bad tattoo! I’m thinking about getting another crappy tattoo just so I can continue to see them 😂 love you both to the moon and thank you for making my experience top notch!

Previous Review: I worked with Zac in the beginning to answer any questions I had. He never pressured me into making a decision. When I did decide to start, he was still just as friendly and comforting with answering all of the questions I still had! Sarah did my first session and she was so kind and talked me through it! I love feeling comfortable with these types of things, so it makes it extra seamless. I’ve now had a few sessions and I learn something new every time! Thank you!

I'm so excited I started my removal service with Removery! Zac and Danielle made my first appointment so easy - I was able to be quoted and seen all in day 1!

Although the service isn't the most comfortable, it's easier than sitting hours in a tattoo chair. It took less than 1 minute to complete both.  I wouldn't recommend this service to anyone who is unhappy with tattoos on their body.

Absolutely amazing team: straight forward intake and exciting first treatment.

Zac did amazing at making sure I understood both the procedure and science behind it. Felt really at ease to ask questions but didn’t have any as it was all very straightforward. He also did amazing at setting expectations based on the size and color of my tattoo.

Getting the laser down was also just as straight forward. Sarah checked in regularly and made sure I was okay. I didn’t need her to take any breaks, but depending on where you have your tattoo you might need a few more.

She was also great at explaining the aftercare to me along with giving me a bag that had all the same details. That’s better than most doctors offices.

Highly recommend.
they literally never answer the phone. It's actually so annoying.
Always enjoy my appointments, it’s not the most fun feeling BUT the personalities of the employees help a ton!
Great appointment, the process can be a bit uncomfortable, but the associate was Patient and informative to help frame my experience.

I had my first session at Removery and I’m honestly so impressed with the experience. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable, welcomed, and well taken care of. They took the time to explain the entire tattoo removal process, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt at ease before getting started.

The treatment itself was quick and way more manageable than I expected. The technician was very gentle, professional, and checked in with me throughout the session to make sure I was doing okay. I also really appreciated how clean and organized everything was — it made me feel confident I chose the right place.

Even after just the first visit, I feel excited to continue the process. If you’re nervous about starting tattoo removal, this is definitely the place to go. Great service, knowledgeable staff, and a very positive first experience!

The staff here is super sweet and very accommodating! In the middle of getting my tattoos removed, and it has been a very easy process. I'm five sessions in and I'm definitely seeing a big difference in the amount of ink that's on my arms and I'm excited to continue to process--They have been very flexible with me on scheduling my sessions And getting me in in a timely manner.

Love going here! Zack and Melania are awesome (everyone is awesome there, bad with names)! My sessions are showing a lot of improvement and I’m at the point where I can barely even feel it. Sessions are so quick too. Zack is great with consults and makes sure your payment plan is realistic to your income. (Was a college student when I started sessions and could afford it) Overall, amazing studio.

My experience has been great and would definitely recommend. Getting the unlimited package will save you a lot of money and get you the best results. I see Sarah & she is awesome, she makes my treatment go fast and easy!

Z-A-C is the M-V-P I’m so sorry it’s taken so long to leave this review, but I couldn’t be on this journey without you! And Sarah is cool too :)

Sorry I don’t know if I’ve ever left a Google review before, but here it goes !!

Zac heard and connected with me as a person, not just a number or a sale. He really took the time to sit and explain things to me, listen to me, and care about my concerns and needs. He did such a phenomenal job I was speechless and almost in tears at how kind and awesome he is. I wish there were more people like him in the world. He is so nice and understanding, cares about people and helping them achieve their dreams with their tattoo removals. Words cannot express how awesome I think he is, and how great he is at his job !! If I could give him 100 stars I would. He is the reason I’m able to be doing my removal which is so important to me. I literally couldn’t have done this without him and I am forever grateful.

Sarah was also so sweet and made me feel comfortable during my near-painless experience. It was quick and easy, and she took good care of me too. So far it’s been great with her and I give her a 5 star rating as well ! I am looking forward to more sessions with her as I trust her and know I’m in good hands ! I’m thrilled for this opportunity and thank both of y’all from the bottom of my heart !!
Zack was very thorough with the process and cost. I cannot wait to get my session started
I’m impressed with the removal. They are disappearing pretty fast. Love the staff. They are on top of their game.

Since I first started with getting my tattoos removed at Removery in South Austin I have been very satisfied with the services they offer.  The employees there are very nice,respectful and helpful.  I'd highly recommend them to anyone who wants to do tattoo removal.  Salutations
